addCompany.title: Add company
addCompany.verificationRequiredBody: Your account must be verified to create a company.

deleteRole.title: Delete role?
deleteRole.message: This will permanently delete the role. Members assigned to it will lose its permissions. This action cannot be undone.

deleteTeam.title: Delete team?
deleteTeam.message: This will permanently delete the team. Its members will not be removed from the company. This action cannot be undone.

deleteWorker.title: Remove worker?
deleteWorker.message: This will remove the worker from the company. This action cannot be undone.

companies.emptySubtitle: Companies you create will show up here.

roles.emptySubtitle: Roles you create will show up here.

teams.emptySubtitle: Teams you create will show up here.

workers.emptySubtitle: Workers you invite will show up here.

settings.deleteDescription: Deleting this company permanently removes all of its projects, teams, and members. This action cannot be undone.

deleteCompany.title: Delete company?
deleteCompany.message: This will permanently delete the company and all of its projects, teams, and members. This action cannot be undone.
